stage43b1_external_eval_only_policy.summary: Stage43-B1 VitaminC and Climate-FEVER data remain external-evaluation-only.

c0_summary.result: Both datasets INCOMPLETE because safe_structured_v2 composer output was unavailable for every row.

c2_shadow_export_summary.shadow_export_result: Stage32/36/37/39 shadow/composer fields became available for external rows.

vitaminc_result.interpretation: Closer in-family fact-verification than Climate-FEVER, but still severe NOT_ENTITLED collapse; no transfer-success claim.

climate_fever_result.interpretation: Cross-domain limitation; not a training signal and not a robustness claim.

safety_counter_summary.interpretation: No introduced unsafe SUPPORT or REFUTE/SUPPORT flips were observed in Stage43-C2.

allowed_claims: Stage43 external eval hook works post-best-state restoration.
No introduced unsafe SUPPORT / REFUTE-to-SUPPORT / SUPPORT-to-REFUTE transitions were observed in C2.
recommendation: Freeze Stage43 as an honest negative/incomplete external validation result. Do not tune thresholds/calibration on Stage43-B1 and do not use Stage43-B1 for checkpoint/model selection.
next_stage_options: Pre-register a future training-stage design using only controlled/internal data, then re-evaluate Stage43-B1 once, read-only.
Acquire a separate held-out external set before any redesign if additional external validation is needed.
Keep Stage43-B1 protected as evaluation-only evidence and report current results as incomplete/no external PASS.
